mapper.select: SELECT item_id, item_name, supplier_id, quality_retention_days, unit_price, created_at, updated_at FROM items
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO items (item_name, supplier_id, quality_retention_days, unit_price) VALUES (#{itemName}, #{supplierId}, #{qualityRetentionDays}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET item_name = #{itemName}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, quality_retention_days = #{qualityRetentionDays}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
